neurohcp 0.8.1
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Getting Data from the Human Connectome Project (HCP)
  • Changelog

neurohcp: Human Connectome Project Interface

Downloads and reads data from Human ‘Connectome’ Project https://db.humanconnectome.org using Amazon Web Services (‘AWS’) ‘S3’ buckets.

Installation

You can install neurohcp from github with:

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("muschellij2/hcp")

Links

  • Download from CRAN at
    https://​cloud.r-project.org/​package=neurohcp
  • Browse source code at
    https://​github.com/​muschellij2/​neurohcp/​
  • Report a bug at
    https://​github.com/​muschellij2/​neurohcp/​issues
